nasb.text: Then death and Hades were thrown into the lake of fire. This is the second death, the lake of fire.

esv.text: Then Death and Hades were thrown into the lake of fire. This is the second death, the lake of fire.

cnv.text: 死亡和陰間也被拋在火湖裡。這火湖就是第二次的死。

ccb.text: 之后，死亡和阴间也被扔进火湖里，这火湖就是第二次的死。

csbs.text: 然后，死亡和阴间被丢进火湖里，这火湖就是第二次的死亡。
